title: Lab 45: Restore Default SELinux Context
description: Restore the default SELinux context on existing web content without disabling SELinux.

tasks.title: the file /var/www/html/index45.html has the wrong
tasks.prompt: On clientvm, the file /var/www/html/index45.html has the wrong SELinux context. Restore the default context.

tasks.title: Ensure the httpd service is enabled and running
tasks.prompt: Ensure the httpd service is enabled and running. SELinux must remain enforcing.

hints: Do not use chcon for the final state.

checks.original_command: systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active
checks.command: systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active
